items.title: 主线结论（系统版｜条件触发）
items.summary:
- 主要驱动因素：10年期利率 + 原油价格风险事件
- 四大监控指标：10年期利率（方向/拐点）｜美元指数（强弱）｜VIX指标（是否抬升）｜原油价格/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10年期利率上升→纳斯达克/标普500承压更明显；美元指数上升→黄金价格更易回撤；VIX指标上升→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10年期利率继续上行且VIX抬升→偏纳斯达克/标普500先空后看、黄金价格偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10年期利率回落且VIX回落→偏纳斯达克/标普500修复反弹、黄金价格喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：
items.summary_en:
- 主导因子：10Y/利率 + 原油/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10Y（方向/拐点）｜DXY（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10Y↑→NQ/ES承压更明显；DXY↑→GC更易回撤；VIX↑→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10Y继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10Y回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且VIX回落→再考虑卖波动
- ——
- 地缘/避险线索：Goldman Sachs resets oil-price bets as war rages on…
- 宏观/Fed线索：Best CD rates today, March 21, 2026 (best account provides 4.15% APY)…

items.title: AI 时代，企业以更少的资源取得更大成就。员工也可以从中受益。
items.summary: 随着公司通过人工智能技术提高生产力并降低员工人数，剩余员工需要重新培训和提高技能。
items.title_en: Companies are doing more with less in AI era. Workers can take advantage
items.summary_en: As companies boost productivity and lower headcount with AI technology, it will be crucial for remaining workers to retrain and upskill.

items.title: 史诗级的AI升级将为Spotify带来新的收入来源
items.summary: 最近Spotify与ChatGPT的合作是AI在一个追随者市场中成为流媒体音乐服务最佳防御手段的又一迹象。
items.title_en: Why Spotify AI more than music will be the secret to keeping subscribers
items.summary_en: A recent Spotify-ChatGPT deal is one more sign of how AI may be the best defense for a streaming music service in a me-too market for subscribers.

items.title_en: OpenAI's data center pivot underscores Wall Street spending concerns ahead of IPO
items.summary_en: As OpenAI gears up for a potential IPO, it's outlined a more tempered infrastructure strategy and has moved away from an ambitious agreement with Nvidia.

items.summary: 霍尔木兹海峡航道中断的持续担忧使投资者感到紧张，周一石油价格在波动交易中波动。
items.title_en: Oil prices whipsaw as Trump’s Hormuz ultimatum and Iran threats keep markets on edge
items.summary_en: Fears over a prolonged disruption in the Strait of Hormuz have kept investors on edge as oil prices swung in volatile trading Monday.

items.title: 伊朗和美国以色列继续升高杠杆，霍尔木兹海峡紧张局势加剧。
items.summary: 伊朗扩大了对购买美国国债的警告，最新的一轮威胁是在战争进入第四周后爆发的。
items.title_en: Iran and U.S.-Israel continue to raise the stakes as Strait of Hormuz tensions build
items.summary_en: Iran widened its warnings to target buyers of U.S. Treasury bonds, the latest salvo in an intensifying exchange of threats as the war entered its fourth week.

items.title: 美国股指期货稳定，特朗普和伊朗之间威胁民用基础设施。

items.title_en: U.S. stock futures flat as Trump and Iran trade threats against civilian infrastructure
items.summary_en: U.S. stock-index futures bounced between slight losses and gains on Sunday night, as new threats of escalation from both President Donald Trump and Iran threatened to intensify the conflict roiling the Persian Gulf region.

items.title: 特朗普发表霍尔木兹海峡最后通牒

items.summary_en: U.S.-Iran threats over Hormuz rattle markets as oil risk lingers and missiles hit Israel, raising fears of a prolonged conflict.

items.title: 金融市场对伊朗冲突的反应让一些投资者感到困惑。
items.summary: 黄金，通常在压力时期的避风港，但黄金价格却在下跌。与此同时，股市下跌，但并没有像许多人预期的那么严重。
items.title_en: Financial markets are responding to the Iran conflict in unexpected ways — leaving some investors puzzled
items.summary_en: Gold, often a haven during times of stress, has been falling. Meanwhile, stocks are down, but not as much as many expected.

items.summary_en: Corporate executives are not panicking over a short-term increase in oil prices and Strait of Hormuz closure, but patience may wear thin in a matter of weeks.

items.title: 英国确认伊朗向印度洋的英国-美国基地发射了两枚导弹，但未能击中目标。
